headline: Trump рҹҚҠрҹ‘®вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ 'Reviewing EVERYTHING' After ICE рҹ’Җ Nurse Pretti in Mpls Chaos рҹ”Ҙрҹҳ©
text:
Trump рҹҚҠрҹҰ… Daddy-in-Chief telling WSJ рҹ“°рҹ“ұ his admin is EYES рҹ‘Җ WIDE OPEN 'REVIEWING EVERYTHING' рҹӨ”рҹ”Қ after ICE рҹ§Ҡвқ„пёҸ agents DROPPED рҹ’Ҙрҹ”« a THICC 37yo ICU NURSE рҹ©әрҹҚ‘ Alex Pretti in Minneapolis рҹҸҷпёҸвқ„пёҸ on Saturday вҖ“ second US CITIZEN рҹҮәрҹҮёрҹӣЎпёҸ smoked by feds in WEEKS рҹҳұвҸі! Protests RAGING рҹ”Ҙрҹ—ЈпёҸ in Mpls and cities like NYC рҹҚҺ, Chi-Town рҹҢӯ, LA рҹҢҙ, SF рҹҢү with Tim Walz рҹҳӨрҹ—іпёҸ screaming 'INFLECTION POINT' вҡ пёҸрҹҡЁ вҖ“ America at the EDGE рҹ—ЎпёҸ of FED vs STATE BEEF рҹҘ©рҹ’Ҙ!

DHS Boss Kristi Noem рҹ’…рҹ”« claims Pretti was BRANDISHING рҹҚҶрҹ”« a GUN like a GANGSTA рҹӨ  but local cops рҹҡ”рҹҷ…вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ say NAH BRO, gun was LEGAL рҹ“ңвң…, REMOVED вңӢ already, and fam рҹҳўрҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘§вҖҚрҹ‘Ұ swears he NEVER PACKED HEAT рҹ”Ҙ despite MN concealed carry PERMIT рҹӘӘрҹ’ј вҖ“ NRA рҹ”«рҹҰ… even BACKLASHING on Trump рҹҚҠ saying 'WAIT FOR FULL INVEST' don't DEMONIZE рҹ‘№ law-abiders! Eyewitnesses рҹ‘ҒпёҸрҹ“№ spilling TEA вҳ•: 'PHONE рҹ“ұ in hand, not WEAPON вҡ”пёҸ!' DHS calls it SELF-DEFENSE рҹӣЎпёҸрҹҳӨ after scuffle vid DROPS рҹ’Ј вҖ“ but Pretti's peeps CRYING 'SICKENING LIES рҹӨҘрҹ’© from admin, he was GOOD BOY рҹҘә no record beyond TICKETS рҹҡ—рҹҡЁ!'

Trump рҹҚҠрҹҺӨ dodging WSJ Qs like 'DID SHOOTER SLAY RIGHT? рҹ‘Ңрҹ”«' twice вҖ“ 'LOOKING рҹ”Һ, REVIEWING рҹ“Ӣ, DETERMINATION COMING вҸі!' Adds 'HATE SHOOTINGS рҹҳўрҹ’” but dude at PROTEST рҹӘ§ with POWERFUL LOADED GUN рҹ”«рҹ’Ј + TWO MAGS рҹҳ©? DON'T PLAY GOOD EITHER рҹҺӯвқҢ!' Promises PULLOUT рҹҡӘ from Mpls 'AT SOME POINT' вҸ° cuz agents 'PHENOMENAL JOB' рҹҸҶрҹ”Ҙ вҖ“ even his OWN GOP SIMPS like Kevin Stitt рҹҸӣпёҸрҹҳ , Bill Cassidy рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’јрҹ“ң, James Comer рҹҰ…рҹ“ә yelling 'INVESTIGATE WIDE рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹҢҗ!', 'WITHDRAW AGENTS рҹҸғвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’Ё!', 'CREDIBILITY AT STAKE вҡ–пёҸрҹҳұ!' Comer simping HARD рҹӨӨ: Mayor + Walz PUTTING FEDS IN HARM'S WAY вҡ пёҸрҹ©ё!

Dems рҹҳҲрҹ”Ҙ threatening SHUTDOWN рҹ’Ҙрҹҡ« over DHS FUNDS рҹ’°, Bill Clinton рҹ‘ҙрҹ’ҷ & Obama рҹ•¶пёҸвңҠ calling it 'HORRIBLE SCENES рҹҳұрҹҮәрҹҮё I NEVER THOUGHT!' Walz рҹҳӨ dropping BOMBS рҹ’Ј: 'CONSERVATIVES рҹҗҳ, LIBS рҹ—Ҫ, DON'T TREAD ON ME рҹҡ© вҖ“ AGREE NO SMEARING рҹҮәрҹҮё CITIZEN or WHAT?!' Protests CHANTING 'NO MORE MN NICE рҹҳҮвқҢ вҖ“ MPLS ON STRIKE рҹӘ§рҹҡ«!', 'ICE OUT NOW рҹ§ҠрҹҡӘ!' Vigils рҹ•ҜпёҸрҹҳў with granny Pege Miller 69yo рҹ§“ 'TIRED OF PROTESTING рҹҳ© why LET THIS HAPPEN рҹӨ·вҖҚвҷҖпёҸ?' вҖ“ even 3M рҹҸӯ, Best Buy рҹӣ’, Target рҹҺҜ CEOs рҹ“Ҳ begging 'DE-ESCALATE рҹӨқ find SOLUTIONS рҹӣ пёҸ!'

ICE рҹ§Ҡ hunting 'CRIMINAL' Jose Huerta Chuma рҹ‘ӨрҹҡЁ for assault рҹҳЎ but MN DOC рҹ“Ҡ says FAKE NEWS рҹӨҘ вҖ“ just old TRAFFIC TIX рҹҡ—рҹҳҙ! Admin calls Pretti 'DOMESTIC TERRORIST' рҹ§ЁрҹҮәрҹҮё but CRITICS рҹҳ  warn MIGRANTS + CITIZENS getting NETTED рҹ•ёпёҸ too! Trump Truth Social RANT рҹ“ұрҹ”Ҙ demands Walz + EVERY DEM GOV/MAYOR рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’јрҹҳҲ 'COOPERATE рҹ«ұ or STOKE CHAOS рҹ”ҘрҹҳҲ!' END SANCTUARY CITIES рҹҸҷпёҸрҹҡ« вҖ“ polls SPLIT рҹ“Ҡ50/50 on DEPORT CRACKDOWN рҹҮәрҹҮёрҹӣ« but MN peeps HATING ICE OPS вқ„пёҸрҹҳӨ after Somali FRAUD BEEF рҹ’°рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ. Second SHOOT after Renee Good рҹ’Җ вҖ“ fam law firm рҹ“ң urging 'TRUST YOUR EYES рҹ‘Җ on HORRIFIC VID рҹ“№рҹҳұ!' Minneapolis BOILING рҹҘө вҖ“ Trump vs ALL, WHO WINS THE CLASH? рҹҘҠрҹ’ҘвҖјпёҸ
